welcome.tagline: Structure your knowledge, visualize your ideas, and learn effectively.

ai_structure.title: AI-Powered Structuring
ai_structure.description: Transform unstructured notes into organized schemas with a single click.

visualize.title: Visualize Connections
visualize.description: Explore your knowledge as an interactive tree to see the bigger picture.

learn.title: Learn with SRS
learn.description: Generate flashcards from your notes and master concepts with spaced repetition.

privacy.title: Privacy First & Offline
privacy.description: All your data stays on your device, securely stored in your browser.

term.title: Term
term.description: Add a new concept or term.

h1.title: Heading 1
h1.description: The main title of the schema.

image.title: Image
image.description: Add an image from a URL.

math_inline.title: Formula (Inline)
math_inline.description: Add a formula in the same line.

expandNode.title: Expand Node (AI)
expandNode.description: Generate sub-points for the current node.
expandNode.error: To expand, first select a node in the schema.

generateCards.title: Generate Cards (AI)
generateCards.description: Create study cards for this node.
generateCards.error: To generate cards, first select a node.

readNode.title: Read Node
readNode.error: Select a node to start reading.
readNode.errorNoId: Could not find a valid ID for this node to start reading.

editCards.title: Edit Cards
editCards.description: Open the card editor for this document.
editCards.error: Could not open the card editor for this document.
editCards.errorNoId: This node does not have a valid ID to associate cards with.

review.all_reviewed_description: Want to study your most difficult cards instead?
review.no_cards_for_additional_review: No cards available for an additional review.
review.review_started_toast: {type} started with {count, plural, =1 {1 card} other {# cards}}.
review.card_will_reappear_toast: This card will appear again in this session.
review.review_complete_description: You studied {count, plural, =1 {1 card} other {# cards}}.
review.session_finished_desc: You have finished this study session. You reviewed {count, plural, =1 {1 card} other {# cards}}.

card_editor.load_error: Could not load cards for this node.
card_editor.create_error: Failed to create the new card.

card_editor_panel.title: Study Cards
card_editor_panel.tooltip: Create questions and answers for this document. Use them in "Review Mode" to memorize key concepts.
card_editor_panel.load_error: Could not load the cards for this document.
card_editor_panel.prompt_placeholder: e.g., The capital of France is {{...}}
card_editor_panel.empty_message: Add your first study card for this document to begin.

document.invalid_document_error: Item is not a valid document: {docId}

empty_state.title: Create Your First Schema
empty_state.description: Let's create a knowledge base. Click here to start.

tts.stopped_due_to_changes_toast: Playback stopped due to document changes.
tts.no_readable_content_toast: There is no readable content in the document.
tts.node_not_found_error: Could not find the specified node to start reading.
tts.voice_changed_toast: Voice changed. Press play to resume with the new voice.
tts.speed_changed_toast: Speed changed. Press play to resume with the new speed.
tts.volume_changed_toast: Volume changed. Press play to resume with the new volume.

errors.notValidJson: The provided text is not valid JSON.
errors.config_missing: AI model or API key is not configured. Please check AI settings.

step1.title: Step 1: Copy the Prompt
step1.description: Copy the prompt below and paste it into your preferred AI assistant.

step2.title: Step 2: Paste the Response
step2.description: Paste the complete and unmodified JSON response from the AI into the text area below.
step2.placeholder: Paste the AI's JSON response here...

configure.title: Input
configure.description: Provide the initial text or context for the AI to work with.
configure.placeholder: Paste your text, notes, or article here...

refine.title: Refine
refine.description: The draft isn't quite right? Tell the AI what to change.
refine.placeholder_with_selection: e.g., Rewrite this selection to be more formal...

empty_preview.title: Awaiting Generation
empty_preview.description: Configure your input and click 'Generate' to see a preview of the AI's output here.

errors.file_too_large: File is too large. The maximum size is {limit} MB.

prompt.title: Step 1: Copy the Generated Prompt
prompt.description: Copy this prompt and paste it into your preferred AI tool (like Google AI Studio).

paste.title: Step 2: Paste the JSON Response
paste.description: After running the prompt, paste the complete, raw JSON output from the AI tool below.
paste.placeholder: Paste the JSON response from the AI here...

common.editor_not_ready: The editor is not ready. Please try again shortly.

create_schema.title: Create Schema from Text
create_schema.prompt_placeholder: Paste your text, notes, or article here...

error.no_node_selected: To expand a node, you must first select it in the editor.

generate_flashcards.title: Generate Study Cards with AI
generate_flashcards.success: {count, plural, =1 {1 study card} other {# study cards}} generated.

error.no_node_id: Could not generate cards. The current document does not have a valid ID.
error.save_failed: Failed to save the generated cards.
error.no_node_selected: To generate cards, you must first select a node in the editor.
error.no_doc: Save Error: Could not find the active document ID to save cards to.
error.critical: A critical error occurred while trying to save the new cards.

generate_flashcards.info_no_cards: The AI did not generate any cards.

description.export: Please enter a password to encrypt your vault. This will be required for import.
description.import: Please enter the password for the vault you are importing.

toast.no_key_info: No API key found for {provider}. Please add one in AI Settings.

errors.node_selection_required: A node must be selected for this action.
errors.automated_flow_error: This action should not be running in automated node-based flow.

text_input_modal.title: Create Schema from Text
text_input_modal.placeholder: Paste your notes, an article, or any block of text here...

error_diagnostic.title: Error Diagnostic
error_diagnostic.explanation: This is a log of errors that have occurred in the application. If you are experiencing problems, copy this report and send it to the developer for assistance.
error_diagnostic.explanation.privacy: This report does not contain any personal data.

header.drop_zone_aria_label: Drop files here to move to root

state.empty_folder_message: Create a new schema or folder to get started.

status.load_error: There was an error loading the document.

empty_schema.hint: Start typing or use '/' for commands.

apiKeyModal.title: AI Settings
apiKeyModal.explanation: Manage your API keys and select your preferred AI model. Keys are stored securely in your browser's local storage.
apiKeyModal.explanation_models: Select the generative model you want to use for creating content. Available models are discovered automatically using your API key.
apiKeyModal.explanation_keys: Add your Google AI Studio API key to enable generative features. You can add multiple keys to manage rate limits.
apiKeyModal.empty_state: You haven't added any API keys yet.
apiKeyModal.usage_tooltip: Estimated API usage for the selected model.

errors.password_required_export: A password is required to encrypt and export the vault.
errors.invalid_json_file: The selected file is not a valid JSON backup file.
errors.corrupt_vault: Vault data is corrupt or has an invalid format after decryption.

toast.export_failed_desc: Could not generate the backup file. See the error console for more details.
toast.password_required_import: A password is required to decrypt and import the vault.
toast.import_success: Vault imported successfully! The page will now reload.
toast.import_failed_desc: The password may be incorrect, or the selected file may be corrupt or invalid.

search_view.prompt: Start typing to search your entire vault.
search_view.error: There was an error performing the search.
search_view.no_results: No results found for your query.
